name: Medical Services
fullName: UI ~ Assistence - TM Medical record: Medical Services

steps.name: When the user goes to the home page
Given the user chooses "UI_adds_medical_service" in the tm medical record strategy
When the user adds a medical service variable with "utils/data/assistence/tm_medical_record/medical_service_data.json" JSON file
